name: MySQL + Adminer
description: The world's most popular open-source relational database, bundled with Adminer — a lightweight web-based database management UI that supports MySQL, PostgreSQL, SQLite and more.

aws.parity: The same MySQL 8 engine runs locally and on RDS — identical SQL dialect, connectors and wire protocol.
aws.deploy: Provision an RDS for MySQL instance and repoint your connection string; no application changes required.

variables.label: MySQL Port
variables.description: Port on your host machine to bind the MySQL server.

variables.label: Adminer Web Port
variables.description: Port on your host machine to access the Adminer web administration UI.

variables.label: Root Password
variables.description: Password for the MySQL root superuser account.

variables.label: Initial Database
variables.description: Name of the default database created on startup.

variables.label: Username
variables.description: Username for the default non-root database user.

variables.label: Password
variables.description: Password for the default non-root database user.
